text.message: Fozman and I just had a very even game
i thought u were gonna win for like 6 straight turns
even without being bullied into it
maybe stop trading with the clear leader...
suprised you wouldnt block the 4 orange
Nah blue says youre the clear leader
ya. the game changes over time
Exactly. You play by positional strength
9 or 4 hasnt rolled in so long
red is also at 7 right now with open settle...
You were asking for trades too
i am v far from winning
its ok to trade with me
he has an open settle too
